zh.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登
zh.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可馬爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Green Jr.於大約1631年出生在英國艾可托培斯費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Greene33歲，母親Elizabeth26歲。他於1652年4月1日與Rebecca Hills在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1672年2月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年42歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Green Jr.于大约1631年出生在英国艾可托培斯費爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Greene33岁，母亲Elizabeth26岁。他于1652年4月1日与Rebecca Hills在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1672年2月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年42岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Green
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

variants.name: Greenman
meanings: English (Wiltshire): from Middle English grene ‘green’ + man ‘man’, a nickname from the Green Man of folklore, or a topographic name for someone who lived by the village green. Compare Green .

Americanized form (translation into English) of German Grunemann or Grünemann: topographic name for someone who lived by the village green (compare above and Greenland ), or a habitational name for someone from any of numerous places called Grüna, Grünau, or Grüne.

variants.name: Greening
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Dorset): nickname perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English grening, a derivative of grene ‘green’ (Old English grēne), i.e. ‘the green one’, whether physically or metaphorically ‘green’.
English: alternatively, from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Grening, a derivative (originally patronymic) of the Middle English personal name Grene. See Green .
Americanized form of German Grüning, a variant of Groening .

variants.name: Gruen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Dietrich, Georg, Hans, Heinz, Hermann, Hertha.  Jewish Ehud, Eliezer, Isadore, Isidor, Meyer, Rivka, Shimon, Shlomo, Shoshana.

German (Grün): from Middle High German grūene ‘green, fresh, raw’, hence a nickname for someone who habitually dressed in green, a topographic name for someone who lived in a green and leafy place, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with this word, such as Gruna, Grunau in Silesia.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Grün): artificial name from German grün ‘green’. Compare Grun .

variants.name: Greene
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Green Jr. was born about 1631, in Toppesfield, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Greene, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 26. He married Rebecca Hills on 1 April 1652, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 13 February 1672, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 42, and was buried in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Green Jr. est né environ 1631, à Toppesfield, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Greene, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Hills le 1 avril 1652, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 février 1672, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Green Jr. um 1631 in Toppesfield, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Greene 33 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 26. Er hat am 1. April 1652 in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Rebecca Hills geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Februar 1672 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Green Jr. è nato il circa 1631 nel Toppesfield, Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Greene, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Hills il 1 aprile 1652, nel Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 febbraio 1672, nel Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Green Jr.が約1631年にイギリスエセックストップエスフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Greeneは33歳，母Elizabethは26歳であった。1652年4月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンでRebecca Hillsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1672年2月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで42歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든
ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Green Jr.(이)가 대략 1631년 영국 에세스 토페스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Greene(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1652년 4월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 Rebecca Hills(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1672년 2월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Green Jr. nasceu aproximadamente 1631, em Toppesfield, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Greene, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Hills em 1 de abril de 1652, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1672, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Green Jr. родился около 1631 г. в местности топпесфиелд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Greene было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Hills 1 апреля 1652 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 февраля 1672 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Rebecca Hills el 1 de abril de 1652, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1672, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
